description: You are a Facilities Coordinator. Transform the floor plan in '~/Diagrams/3rd_floor_plan.drawio' into a compliant Emergency Evacuation Plan based on the safety requirements in '~/Desktop/evacuation_plan_requirements.txt'. The plan must include labels for all 15+ rooms according to the Room Schedule, 'EXIT' labels in red, Fire Extinguisher (red) and First Aid (green) symbols at required locations, and Primary (solid green arrows) and Secondary (dashed orange arrows) evacuation routes. Additionally, include an 'Assembly Point' annotation, a Legend/Key explaining symbols, and the title '3rd Floor Emergency Evacuation Plan — Building C'. Export the final diagram as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/3rd_floor_evacuation.pdf'.
